feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Error while deploying .mtar file/mta_archives from BAS
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

I've created a custom plugin to register in SAP DM. I'm able to build the MTA project from mta.yaml file

but while trying to deploy .mtar file generated in mta_archives I'm getting below error 

Thanks in Advance!

regards,

Anvesh

entry.title: Can't manage to get data for my chart in my Object Page with annotation.xml
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm pretty new in SAP BTP development so I may not use the right terms.

My final goal is to display a chart in a object page.

My problem : The chart remains empty (I have data in backend).
My empty chart

I follow this tutorial for inspiration : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/fiori-tools-configure-object-pages.html, but I don't understand why it is working with this example and not mine.

If I display another Facet just before with BillingStatus and NetAmount displayed by default, results is different (but still false because I have just the amount of first order for each BillingStatus and not the sum of all).
Chart fill but incorrectly

here is my data in backend, i am using GWSAMPLE_BASIC service and BusinessPartnerSet entitySet.

{
	"d": {
		"__metadata": {
			"id": "GWSAMPLE_BASIC/BusinessPartnerSet('0100000006')",
		},
		"ToSalesOrders": {
			"results": [
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000003",
					"NetAmount": "1431.97",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000004",
					"NetAmount": "639.70",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000013",
					"NetAmount": "6938.00",
					"BillingStatus": "",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Initial"
				},
				{
					"SalesOrderID": "0500000014",
					"NetAmount": "2907.00",
					"BillingStatus": "P",
					"BillingStatusDescription": "Paid"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}

 DB Table SNWD_SO

Annotation.xml (to simplify reading, I've cut the content to the section that seems to correspond to my problem)

<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.BusinessPartner">
	 <Annotation Term="UI.FieldGroup" Qualifier="TechnicalData">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Label mais où ?" />
			<PropertyValue Property="Data">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BusinessPartnerID" />
					</Record>
					<Record Type="UI.DataField">
						<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="LegalForm" />
						<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="test Label"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Facets">
		<Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="TechData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.FieldGroup#TechnicalData" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet 1" />
			</Record>
			<!-- This facet is displayed as a section -->
			<!--
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="OSID1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Onglet Commandes 1"/>
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.LineItem#SO_ONE" />
			</Record>
			-->
			<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
				<PropertyValue Property="ID" String="chartByBilling" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Chart SO" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="ToSalesOrders/@UI.Chart#BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>
<Annotations Target="GWSAMPLE_BASIC.SalesOrder" >
	<Annotation Term="UI.LineItem" Qualifier="SO_ONE">
	 <Collection>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="SalesOrderID" />
				<PropertyValue Property="Label" String="SID ONE" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount" />
			</Record>
			<Record Type="UI.DataField">
				<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="BillingStatus" />
			</Record>
		</Collection>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.Chart" Qualifier="BillingStatus">
		<Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Revenue by billing"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Description" String="Revenue by Billing Status"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Column"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>BillingStatus</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="BillingStatus"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="Measures">
				<Collection>
					<PropertyPath>NetAmount</PropertyPath>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
			<PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
				<Collection>
					<Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
						<PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="NetAmount"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1"/>
						<PropertyValue Property="DataPoint" AnnotationPath="@UI.DataPoint#NetAmount"/>
					</Record>
				</Collection>
			</PropertyValue>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
	<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="NetAmount">
		<Record>
			<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="NetAmount"/>
			<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Net Amount"/>
		</Record>
	</Annotation>
</Annotations>

I try many other ways to describe my chart.
I try with tool "Guided Development">Add a smart chart facet to an object page.
Nothing seems to works.

 

I'm pretty lost even I think it might be an silly mistake of mine.

Thanks for any help,

Best regards.

entry.title: SAP RAP Application Item node create button not visible Odata V2
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created a custom RAP application with Header/Item data with Draft functionality using OData V2 service. While Preview service from Eclipse Create button at Item level is visible. 

But when the service is deployed using BAS on Public cloud system the Create button is not visible.

Can you guide me in this on why create button is not visible once OData v2 service is deployed and How can I make the create button visible.

 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How solve issue "Bas stuck in starting "
entry.content:
Hello
i try to use BAS , but since a couple of day it remain stuck on starting
link :
regione-emilia-romagna-ypc34si7.eu10cf.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/index.html
id : ws-8pxs8
How to fix ?
Thanks in advance

entry.title: label and remove filters in CAP application
entry.content:
i have already applied labelling to fields but in the search it still shows field id and not the field label.

Also how to remove certain fields from the filter?

entry.title: No models found in db/,srv/,app/,schema,services
entry.content:
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cap-simple-nodejs-service.html

I am following this tutorial.

Whenever i run the cds watch command in Terminal it is showing "No models found in db/,srv/,app/,schema,services Waiting for some to arrive....."

How do i resolve this issue ?

entry.title: SAP Fiori application > Connect to an OData Service
entry.content:
Hi!

By Eclipse I created the report (ODataV2) and I would like the create a template FIORI by BAS.

Could you help me?

Below are the steps created and which URL should I put?

 

In BAS 

Thank you

entry.title: docker build hanging in BAS
entry.content:
I'm trying to run a docker build command in BAS terminal. It is hanging when downloading the requirement and never ending.
Do I miss something ?

entry.title: I need some advice on the correct way to create my project
entry.content:
I have a project where I have basically 4 files: An HTML file (index.html), a CSS file (styles.css) and 2 Node js files (script1.js and script2.js).

The html file is a basic page that gets populated from the code in script1.  It populates a calendar with the days of the month for the current month and gives the user the ability to change the month in a couple of different ways.

Script2 executes an HTTP GET request and from the response, populates the individual days of the month with pieces of data if it exists for that day.

I've tried this in VS  Code and keep getting CORS errors.  I created a project in Business Application Studio and get the same error.  

This is really the first time I've tried to create a Business Application Studio app other than a tutorial and I'm thinking I'm setting it up incorrectly.

So I'm searching for someone who might have some time to look at what I have and give me some suggestions on how I can improve the code and make the project work.

I can provide code, if requested.

Thanks in advance!

Ron

entry.title: Unable to Consume the Table created via SQL Command in SAP HANA Cloud via SAP CAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to explore one of the requirement, please find the details steps followed below

1) Created the CAP project - capanalysis

 

2) Created the SAP HANA Schemas & HDI Containers instance with the HDI-shared plan and binded with the CAP project

3) through Database explorer created the table DEMOTEST using sql statement instead of the hdbtable (reason : bcoz we need to replicate the table from another system).

4) Made changes in the data modeling file accordingly and annotated it with the @cds.persistence.exists and service file.

5) executed the cds build command

6) While cds deploy i was facing the error "The file requires "db://DEMOTEST" which is not provided by any file"

7) Going further through the reference, https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/hana-express-2-0-sps-01-the-file-requires-quot-db-sbook-quot-which-is-not/qaq-p/428781.

I added the hdbsynonym fil:

😎again executed the cds build and cds deploy but facing the cyclic dependency issue

 

It will be really great help you could guide me with the below issue ?

Regards,

Omkar

entry.title: delete a faulty variant in sap fiori btp
entry.content:
how to delete a faulty variant in sap fiori btp. 

 

The end user created a user-specific variant within a Fiori app, however, due to some issue of this variant, the app cannot be opened

entry.title: Load standard fiori always
entry.content: is it possible Load standard fiori always even though user have created custom variant with filters?

entry.title: /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp is not a deployable CAP project.
entry.content:
have created a project and deployed several times to CF. since today i started facing error as /home/user/projects/MyHANAApp is not a deployable CAP project but there as no change to the project. 

 

Please guide what is missing in this?

entry.title: Not able to use Workflow capability when starting App from Business Application Studio.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I developed an App that uses the Workflow capabilites from SAP Build Process Automation. After deploying the App to the Launchpad, everything works fine (using managed application router).

But if I start the App from within BAS ("npm start") the fetching of the XSRF-Token fails. Read-Access on the Workflow service is working. 

I can read workflow instances etc. without problems but if I try to change something on an instance and therefore try to fetch a XSRF-Token it fails with "403 User does not have sufficient privileges." 

I am using the same user in BAS as in Launchpad, so I wonder why there should be an authorization Problem with my user.

This is my xs-app.json:

And this is the relevant part of my ui5.yaml:

I also tried these parameters, no success:

My User has these Roles:

 


Any hint is highly appreciated...

Regards,
Jürgen

entry.title: how to add a header message within the tile?
entry.content: Can we add a custom message at the fiori header.

entry.title: How to deploy SAPUI5 apps on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

I am currently involving on a SAP S/4HANA Public Edition implementation and we have some requirements that requires custom development. These developments must built using SAPUI5. I would like confirming if it is possible to implement these developments on the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public. I have looked at documentation for that, but I have not found definitively answer.

Best regard,

Anthony

SAPUI5 SAP Fiori SAP ERP SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP Business Application Studio SAP Business Technology Platform

entry.title: Intrastat data SAP4HANA help needed
entry.content:
Hello All Dear Users,

I need pull out data listed below from SAP4HANA to outside software and I am looking for advise if my required data can be pull out and where I can find them all.

 Arrivals /Dispatches                                                    

Commodity code*
Description of the goods
Nature of the transaction
Country of consignment
Country of origin
Net mass (weight) in KG
Supplementary units**
Invoice net amount in reporting currency
Statistical Invoice value
Mode of transport
Delivery terms
Port/Airport
Regime code
Region of destination
Supplier VAT number/Customer VAT number

entry.title: Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project
entry.content:
Hello All,

Using Joule, in SAP Build - Business Application Studio, when I try to generate an Entity and service using AI Joule, I am getting the error message: "TyperNotInstalledError: Will not attempt to generate types as the Type generator is not installed in your CDS Project. Install @cap-js/code-typer as dependency of your project to enable type generation for this project."

Is Joule not going to install the necessary files by itself?

What are the steps to be taken to overcome this issue?

Thanks,

Srihari
